Transportation¶

This sub-package handles transportation. TransportationManager class provides a means of managing a logistics operation (i.e., transportation of multiple Product objects). TransportationLeg manages individual leg of transportation, including the travel distance, and TransportMode class manages various aspects of transportation modes, including their Impacts and Emissions.
